source_text: 4.1 During employment and for eighteen (18) months thereafter, Executive shall not, directly or indirectly, provide services to any business that directly competes with the Company's gene-editing therapeutics programs within the United States.

source_text: 3.1 The Company may terminate Executive's employment at any time, with or without Cause, subject to the severance provisions herein. If Executive is terminated without Cause or resigns for Good Reason, Executive shall receive twelve (12) months of base salary continuation and twelve (12) months of COBRA premium reimbursement, subject to exécution of a release of claims.
